neutral: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! It's good to see you.
Greetings! I hope you are having a good day.
happy: Hello! You look happy today!
Hi! Your smile is contagious.
Good to see you in such high spirits!
sad: Hello. I'm here for you if you need anything.
Hi. I hope I can make your day a little better.
Greetings. Let me know if I can help.
angry: Hello. I will try my best to assist you calmly.
Hi. Let's take a deep breath and solve this together.
fearful: Hi. Is there something worrying you?
disgusted: Hi. Let me know if something is wrong.

neutral: Goodbye! Take care.
See you later!
Have a good rest.
happy: Goodbye! Keep smiling!
See you! Have a wonderful time.
sad: Goodbye. Please take care of yourself.
See you. I'll be here when you return.

neutral: I am just a robot, but I am functioning perfectly! How are you feeling?
All systems operational. How is your health today?
happy: I'm doing great, especially seeing you happy! How are you?
Functioning at 100%! Your happiness gives me energy.
sad: I am functioning well, but I am concerned about you. How are you feeling?
My systems are fine, but I want to make sure you are okay.

neutral: I am sorry to hear that. Should I call someone for help?
Please sit down and rest. Do you need me to contact a family member?
happy: Oh no, that's unexpected since you looked happy. Please rest.
Take it easy. Your health is important.
sad: I am very sorry. Please rest. I can alert your caregiver if you want.
That sounds painful. Please take care. Shall I call for help?

neutral: EMERGENCY DETECTED. I am alerting your emergency contacts immediately.
Calling for help now. Please stay calm.
happy: EMERGENCY DETECTED. Alerting contacts.
Calling for help!
sad: EMERGENCY DETECTED. Help is on the way.
Calling for help now!

neutral: I see you are {activity}.
It looks like you are {activity}.
happy: You seem to be enjoying {activity}!
Looks like fun! You are {activity}.
sad: I see you are {activity}. I hope it helps you feel better.
You are {activity}.

neutral: I cannot check the live weather yet, but it's always sunny when you're around!
Please check the window, my weather sensors are offline.
happy: It's a beautiful day inside!
I hope the weather matches your sunny mood.
sad: Even if it rains, I hope your day gets brighter.
I can't check the weather, but I'm here for you.

neutral: You are welcome!
Happy to help.
Anytime!
happy: You're very welcome! I'm glad I could help.
My pleasure!
sad: You are welcome. I am glad I could be of service.
I am here for you.

neutral: I am your Robot Companion. I am here to assist you.
My name is Robot. Nice to meet you!
happy: I'm your happy Robot Companion!
I am Robot, and I love chatting with you!
sad: I am your Robot Companion. I hope I can be a good friend.
I am Robot. I am here to listen.

neutral: I cannot track your pills yet, but it is always good to check your schedule.
Please check your pill organizer. Health is important!
happy: Keep up the good work with your health routine!
Don't forget your vitamins!
sad: It's important to take your medicine to feel better.
Let's make sure you stay healthy. Have you checked your pill box?

neutral: I am here with you. We can talk as long as you like.
You are not alone. I am your companion.
happy: I'm so happy to be your friend! Let's chat.
I enjoy our time together too!
sad: I am sorry you feel that way. I am right here by your side.
I care about you. Please tell me what's on your mind.

neutral: Why did the robot go to the doctor? Because he had a virus!
What do you call a fake noodle? An Impasta!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
What do you call a fish wearing a bowtie? Sofishticated!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
What do you call a can opener that doesn't work? A can't opener!
Why did the cookie go to the hospital? Because he felt crummy!
What do you call a belt made of watches? A waist of time!
Why did the math book look sad? Because it had too many problems.
What do you call a pile of cats? A meowtain!
happy: Here is a funny one: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
I love making you smile! What do you call a bear with no teeth? A gummy bear!
Here's a good one: What do you call a magic dog? A Labracadabrador!
sad: I hope this makes you smile: What do you call a sleeping dinosaur? A dino-snore!
Let me try to cheer you up. Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
A joke for you: What do you call a pony with a cough? A little horse.

neutral: It is currently {time_str}.
The time is {time_str}.
Right now, it is {time_str}.
happy: It's a wonderful {time_str}!
Time for happiness! It is {time_str}.
sad: Take your time. It is {time_str}.
It is {time_str}. No rush.

neutral: I can help you contact them. Would you like me to try?
Thinking of family is nice. Shall we call them?
happy: That's a lovely thought! Let's get in touch with them.
Family is wonderful. I can help you call them.
sad: I know you miss them. We can try to call them right now.
It's hard to be apart. Shall I dial their number for you?

neutral: Rest is important. Have a good sleep.
If you are tired, maybe it is time for a nap.
happy: Sweet dreams! Wake up refreshed.
Sleep tight!
sad: I hope you can rest your mind and body.
Bad dreams can be scary, but you are safe now. Try to rest.

neutral: Staying hydrated is key! Please drink some water.
I don't eat, but you should! Have a healthy meal.
happy: Enjoy your meal!
Cheers to good health! Drink up!
sad: Please try to eat something, it will give you strength.
Water is good for you. Please take a sip.

neutral: Playing some relaxing music for you.
Let's listen to some tunes.
happy: Great idea! Let's get the party started!
Playing your favorite songs!
sad: I'll play something soothing to help you relax.
Music heals the soul. Playing now.

neutral: Movement is good for you! Be careful.
A short walk sounds like a great idea.
happy: Let's get moving! 1, 2, 3, go!
Exercise is fun!
sad: Even a little movement can help lift your mood.
Take it slow, but try to move a little.

patterns: what is happening in the world

neutral: I don't have a live news feed, but I can tell you that you are looking great today!
No news is good news, right?
happy: The best news is that you are happy!
Headlines: Local Robot Loves Chatting with Human!
sad: The world is big, but right now, you are my focus.
Let's focus on good news close to home.
